name: Horizon 22
description: London's highest free public viewing gallery with panoramic skyline views.

name: Dishoom Shoreditch
description: Popular Bombay-style café with great atmosphere and strong brunch and dinner options.

name: Leake Street Arches
description: A graffiti-filled tunnel under Waterloo with street art, bars, food and pop-up entertainment.

name: Boxpark Shoreditch
description: Shipping-container street food mall with bars and loud music, easy central meeting point.

name: Dishoom Shoreditch Evening
description: Bombay-style restaurant with shared plates and cocktails, good for longer catchups.

name: Camden Market
description: Sprawling canalside market of food stalls, vintage shops and music.

name: Chin Chin Labs Camden
description: Nitro ice-cream shop inside Camden Market, fun quick stop after browsing nearby stalls.

name: The Jazz Cafe
description: Intimate live music venue with balcony seating, ideal for catching evening gigs.

name: London Eye
description: Huge riverside observation wheel offering classic skyline views.

name: Southbank Centre
description: Arts complex with free riverside seating, cafes and regular events.

name: Bussey Rooftop Bar
description: Rooftop bar with city views, covered seating and pizzas.

name: Peckham Levels
description: Multi-storey creative hub in old car park with street food, studios and casual bar spaces.

name: Greenwich Market
description: Covered historic market with varied street food stalls.

name: Greenwich Park Viewpoint
description: Hilltop viewpoint by General Wolfe statue overlooking Canary Wharf and river.

name: Granary Square Fountains
description: Large square with choreographed fountains and plenty of seating.

name: Coal Drops Yard
description: Restored railway arches now housing shops, bars and restaurants.

name: Dishoom King's Cross
description: Popular Bombay café-style restaurant near Granary Square.

name: Camden Lock Canalside Steps
description: Canalside steps overlooking Camden Lock, easy spot to sit and people-watch.

name: Leake Street Graffiti Tunnel
description: Long legal graffiti tunnel under Waterloo station.

name: Bar Italia
description: Iconic late-opening Italian café ideal for post-theatre coffee.

name: The Breakfast Club Soho
description: Bustling all-day brunch spot with hearty plates.

name: Chinatown Gerrard Street
description: Lively street packed with Chinese restaurants and bakeries.

name: Southbank Undercroft Skate Space
description: Iconic riverside skate undercroft with graffiti and ledges.
